points.text: Fever is a common symptom of COVID-19. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Loss of smell and loss of taste are reported in up to 88% of symptomatic cases. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00012]
Fatigue and muscle pain are common, part of the musculoskeletal symptom cluster. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00012]
Shortness of breath or breathing difficulties can appear, especially in moderate to severe cases. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Headache and nasal congestion are less common COVID-19 symptoms. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Diarrhea and other digestive issues may occur in COVID-19. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Eye irritation and toe swelling or discoloration have been reported in COVID-19 patients. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Congestion, runny nose, or sore throat (common cold symptoms). [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Digestive issues: upset stomach, vomiting, or diarrhea. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Headaches and body or muscle aches. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Severe signs: persistent fever, confusion, or trouble staying awake (emergency). [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]
